headline: Kimco Realty® Management to Present at Nareit’s REITweek: 2026 Investor Conference
summary: JERICHO, N.Y., May 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM) announced today that members of its management team will present at the Nareit REITweek Investor Conference on Wednesday, June 3, 2026. The webcast information is as follows: When: Wednesday, June 3, 2026 from 2:00 PM – 2:30 PM, ET Live Webcast: Kimco Realty Presentation Link, or enter https://vimeo.com/event/5873106/ into your browser. Audio from the conference will be available on Kimco Realty’s investor relations websit
